text: **DrJill:** Hello, I'm Dr.
**DrJill:** Jill.
**DrJill:** Welcome to Let's Learn English with Anna.
**DrJill:** The world has many {great|素晴らしい/素晴らしな|/ɡreɪt/|Great job!} places and we can {visit|訪れる/観光する|/ˈvɪzɪt/|I want to visit Paris.} them from our own homes.
**DrJill:** Books, {pictures|絵/写真|/ˈpɪktʃərz/|I love old pictures.}, and videos can take you all over the world.
**DrJill:** So today we ask, where do you want to visit?
**DrJill:** Let's visit Anna's {treehouse|木の上の家|/ˈtriːhaʊs/|Kids love treehouse.}
**DrJill:** She answers the question, where do you want to visit?
**Anna:** Hi, I am Anna.
**Anna:** Welcome to my tree house.
**Anna:** I love to visit new places, but sometimes I {cannot|できない|/ˈkænɒt/|I cannot go outside.}
**Anna:** This is an old {toy|おもちゃ|/tɔɪ/|This is my favorite toy.}
**Anna:** In it, I can see new places.
**Anna:** I can also see new places with books, {photos|写真|/ˈfoʊtoʊz/|I have many old photos.}, and videos.
**Anna:** Where do I want to visit?
**Anna:** Where do I want to visit?
**Max:** Anna, where do you want to visit?
**Anna:** Max, can you show me {Finland|フィンランド|/ˈfɪnlənd/|Finland is a beautiful country.}?
**Max:** Here is a forest in Finland.
**Anna:** Finland looks very {fun|楽しい|/fʌn/|This party is fun.}!
**DrJill:** Now let's hear from some friends.
**DrJill:** They answer the question, where do you want to visit?
**Students:** I want to visit New York.
**Students:** I want to visit the Victoria Memorial in {Kolkata|コルカタ|/kɒlˈkɑːtə/|Kolkata is in India.}, India.
**Students:** You want to go to New Mexico, it's right there.
**Students:** It's in America.
**DrJill:** Those places all sound great.
**DrJill:** Anna wants to visit some {festivals|祭り/フェスティバル|/ˈfɛstəvəlz/|Music festivals are exciting.}
**DrJill:** These are fun events of different countries.
**DrJill:** Let's see where she goes.
**Anna:** Here is a {party|パーティー/祝典} for Finland.
**Anna:** Let's go see.
**Anna:** Finland has many {forests|森林/森}.
**Anna:** People in Finland like to {walk|歩く/散歩する} in the forest.
**Anna:** There is a {secret|秘密の/隠された} path.
**Anna:** Let's go.
**Anna:** This is a secret path.
**Anna:** Hi.
**Anna:** Well, not so secret.
**Anna:** Oh my gosh, look at that {tree|木/樹}.
**Anna:** Sometimes big trees {fall|倒れる/落ちる} in the forest.
**Anna:** That is a great secret.
**DrJill:** What is the same with these words?
**DrJill:** {Vary|変化する/異なる}, visit, fun, friend, Finland.
**DrJill:** That's right.
**DrJill:** They all begin with F or V.
**DrJill:** Can you hear the {difference|違い/区別} between f and v?
**DrJill:** Let's watch Anna.
**DrJill:** She knows the difference.
**Anna:** F f {fine|上等の/良い}.
**Anna:** V V Vine
**Anna:** Fine vine.
**Anna:** With the sound, your teeth are on your bottom lip.
**Anna:** You {blow|吹く/吐き出す} air out.
**Anna:** Listen and watch.
**Anna:** Fine fun Finland
**Anna:** Feel your throat.
**Anna:** It does not move.
**Anna:** With the sound, your teeth are also on your bottom lip.
**Anna:** But your lip {buzzes|ブンブン鳴る/振動する} like a bee.
**Anna:** Mmm, {vine|ぶどう/つる|/vaɪn/|I grow vine in my garden.} very {visit|訪問/視察|/ˈvɪzɪt/|We visit the museum today.}
**Anna:** Feel your {throat|喉|/θroʊt/|My throat hurts today.}
**Anna:** It moves.
**Anna:** Fine.
**Anna:** Vine.
**DrJill:** Thanks, Ada
**DrJill:** Now you try it.
**DrJill:** Ask your {friends|友人/仲間|/frendz/|My friends are coming over.} and {family|家族|/ˈfæmɪli/|My family loves to travel.}, where do you want to {visit|訪問/旅行|/ˈvɪzɪt/|I want to visit Paris.}?
**DrJill:** And don't forget to come back to Let's Learn English with Anna.
**DrJill:** See you soon
